first_run.rationale: The score is identical (6/10) across both evaluations. The core reasoning, strengths, and concerns remain substantively the same: the model consistently praises the candidate's high-throughput systems experience and recent AI work while flagging the lack of Python and insufficient evidence of staff-level strategic leadership. The minor rephrasing and the addition of one small concern ('No explicit operational/on-call... experience') in the variant fall within the bounds of normal run-to-run noise and do not alter the overall assessment of the candidate's fit.
